caption: A man wearing glasses, a light blue button-down shirt, and a dark blazer speaks against a stylized blue and purple digital background. He has dark hair and a mustache, and he is positioned centrally in the frame from the chest up. At the bottom of the scene, a blue banner contains a logo on the left and the white text "Prof. M. D. Atrey". To the left of the text is a logo featuring a blue gear-like symbol with the letters "NPTEL" written in white below it. As the video progresses, the man's facial expressions shift slightly as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing and his gaze remaining directed toward the camera. The background and the on-screen text remain static throughout the sequence.
